[{"Name":"Jonny Katz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQZvPbRUvW2rxiQ3QN_PkoRg54J1sroTh3jUylV1_b56S9LA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is by far the best Dental practice I’ve ever experienced and in NYC! Not one to usually enjoy the dentist, Dr. Reddy (and dental assistants) made my visits extremely comforting, professional, one of a kind, painless and something I actually looked forward too! They also give you a x ray and show you scans to provide reasons for potential treatments. Everyone from the front desk to the dentists were very kind and welcoming. It’s the first time in my life I left smiling and happy for taking care of my teeth the proper way. As for billing and reasons for certain services they are 10/10, upfront, clear, not pushy and no upselling! It’s also very convenient that it’s by so many subway stops. I was really surprised in my few visits the last couple of weeks I never once experienced any pain or discomfort. They also make sure any fillings are perfectly fitted before you leave. Dr. Reddy was the first dentist I saw at 209 a year or so ago. I chose to stick with her and I couldn’t have made a better choice! She really cares about the person, the passion for dentistry, the staff and making sure the person leaves with the best quality and experience. If you’re looking for a dentistry that will change the way you think about the dentist, book your appointment (by the way super easy to book appointments too) with Dr. Reddy (or their other talented and caring dentists)! I’m not joking while getting my filling put in I actually said “this reminds me of the spa”! Fair pricing for the quality as well! 100/100!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"bklyn747","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKh7fOjdsDvl-FRNQ4ok5lUJq_t-WIS29jf7xiUXXG9K9rlbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited 209 NYC Dental for the first time with my child in December. As a new patient during one of the busiest times of year—when many people rush to use remaining insurance benefits—I wasn’t sure what to expect.

The check-in process was thorough, and while there was some waiting, this seemed perfectly reasonable given the seasonal rush. When I was asked to pay upfront for my procedure, I inquired about the policy. This practice didn’t surprise me, as I’ve encountered the same approach at other medical providers, including major academic medical centers like Columbia University Irving Medical Center and NewYork-Presbyterian, where payment responsibility is routinely confirmed before appointments.
What truly stood out was the quality of care once we were seen. Dr. Park and her assistant were exceptional with my child—keeping the atmosphere relaxed, engaging her in light conversation, and expertly easing her nerves throughout the visit. Dr. Ifraimov went above and beyond by taking care of an unscheduled procedure for me, saving me from having to return for a follow-up visit. Both experiences were professional, well-organized, and genuinely attentive.
Communication was clear at every step, and the treatment exceeded my expectations. This is top-notch dental care delivered with skill and consideration. I’m grateful we found this practice and would confidently recommend it to other families.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DeJuan Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOSlklzOy33y943kKmHQN_kMgFWX5uApWQqrhQus6jYJTb2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend this office.
Dainea, the treatment coordinator, was absolutely amazing from the very beginning. She went out of her way to help me secure an appointment before the end of the year so I could maximize my insurance benefits, which I truly appreciated. She was organized, responsive, and made the entire scheduling process completely stress-free.
Dr. Reddy is one of the kindest and most gentle dentists I’ve ever met. She took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I was comfortable throughout the entire visit. I honestly didn’t feel the injection at all, which says so much about her skill and gentle approach. The procedure itself was quick, smooth, and completely painless, and I felt at ease the whole time.
From start to finish, the entire team made me feel cared for and comfortable. This was hands down the best dental experience I’ve ever had, and I would highly recommend this dental office to anyone looking for exceptional care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zarin Anika","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8cCIJszZvVHLqs2jNTgoKnU3ElEsB96m806ixlZ5PjITZ4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had my first visit at this office and it was great! I was seen right away after check in. The entire visit was efficient and the staff were very transparent and helpful throughout. They were not pushy on trying to sell me “extra stuff,” like my old dentist office had done in the past. I had a great check up here at 209.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pratik Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINHeBafV81RbhquwgyftblR_NbqWFvkMFqH0qSkt5wxsPUsxM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely Disappointing First Visit at 209 NYC Dental

This was my first time visiting this dental office, and unfortunately the experience was disappointing from the very beginning, primarily due to the front desk, lack of compassion and billing process.

There was no greeting or attempt to make a new patient feel welcome. The interaction immediately started with “What’s your name?” and “Can I have your ID?” followed by being directed to make payment, with no explanation of next steps or what the charges included.

The biggest issue was lack of transparency around pricing, insurance and the attitude towards addressing it and making the patient comfortable. The staff could not clearly explain costs ahead of payment and assumed patients were aware of last-minute insurance updates. In my case, no one mentioned during appointment booking that providing a panoramic X-ray from my previous dentist could help reduce costs. This was only brought up afterward, and when I asked why it wasn’t communicated earlier, I was told, “Didn’t you read the email sent an hour ago?” which felt dismissive and unprofessional.

For a practice that accepts same day appointments and walk-ins, appointments booked a day in advance, patients shouldn’t be expected to already know all the right questions to ask. That defeats the purpose of having a reception team to guide new patients.
They also require payment before treatment, and any adjustments mean rescheduling the appointment entirely wasting an entire morning.

I came with a referral and high expectations, but the front desk organization, communication, and billing process made this a frustrating experience.
If you are still considering this office, I strongly recommend confirming all insurance details, X-ray requirements, and charges in advance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Robbins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqzm0vHxJAW6k55yZM1aCFdeDO92dWv6HtEh_rQoE1JmTflXc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great visit overall! The X-ray technician was very friendly, and I appreciated his gentle approach to placing the things in my mouth. Aaron is a great hygienist and did a very thorough cleaning. Also very friendly. I appreciated the scan that Dr. Yasmika did and how she explained everything to me on the screen. The only area of improvement I would mention is that there was a bit of wait times between each thing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tiffany Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdgX7a25ldz3s3EFd-PpL6_x7LOi4UH0GpUELjXJQ-HuBudnVEuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff are always hospitable. Simple and easy check ins. They remind you of your upcoming appointments via text, email and call based on preferences. All dentist assistants are very caring and efficient. The doctor's office is in a residential building, space is clean, and bright but very welcoming. I came across this dentist because I had a tooth ache a little over a year ago and I've been back ever since.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jill Hamer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2X1haG7_hNVm2uWaaQeuYSr3jg0WhO4QR11hhMJOtlNL9ikE_jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I saw all the 5 star reviews and was skeptical but this place is really quite excellent! I had a tooth pulled by Dr. Jin Wang. He was EXCELLENT! Why? 1) He is personable 2) throughout the procedure after asking me to do something such as open my mouth wider, etc he would say, "Thank you." This small act throughout let me know he was present and was incredibly reassuring. He said he does many extractions each day which worried me that he would rush though the procedure, but nope he took his time and did not treat me as just another procedure among many. I'm deeply appreciative for his care.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Su took my x-rays and scans and it was my smoothest experience to date. Marinela was a phenomenal hygienist and Dr Carpenter took the time to hear all my concerns and discuss solutions with me. I didn’t feel judged at all(which i feel is rare in the dental world). Will definitely be returning & recommending to all of my friends and family","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jerry Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLh1TqOs2izO41dJ4bTftNA7V1LNYm_tSiZiTwCIcgQcjf0Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here from a referral from a coworker after a horrible visit to another dental office. (Horrible is an understatement)
Was nice from the moment I walked thru the doors by a welcoming staff. Not by a generic, “hello, how are you?”. Staff was kind, soft spoken and especially patient.
I also wanted a 2nd opinion from another dentist, after the horrible 30sec exam I had at the last office.
Dr. Ellie (hope I spelled her name correctly) who examined me was so nice, so professional and she introduced herself! She took the time to completely explain everything to me, from diagnosis, the x-rays to future work that needed to be done, step by step. I’m not really an educated person, but she took the time to make sure I understood the situation with my teeth, instead of throwing big medical/dental terminology at me.
Although I left the place with bad news, (do NOT neglect your teeth ppl!!!) I left very happy and content, fully confident that I/my teeth was in good hands. Thank you Hudson Dental!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0-LjZmUuxpUmvzTmVWr_pAss08zMEnqeYzqVC2cUbFI9_drQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I enjoyed the experience except for the x rays. Highly recommended if you’re looking for a positive and easy dental experience. 5 stars","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randy yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjmT5M3rnqbB0X2yEf9uDaFV8JW_AWR50KZ2-nPl9DqjrtGxY0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best dental visit I've had. The staff is very professional and polite. Hygienist and Dr Kim are very informative on how to keep your teeth healthy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea lesko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOUtD5mlbcAQj0wB2c5lxQukDVDOZtYOfDhaO975nNNTim9vQV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very clean and well-organized treatment rooms
Modern equipment and technology
Bright space with natural light
Comfortable dental chairs
Friendly and professional staff
I would like to thank the Hygienist  Marinela for the professionalism  and Dr Vashi for professional advises , calming, which helps reduce patient anxiety.
I strongly raccomando the Hudson Street Dental Office , Thank you for your service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Bright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIr9zQYN-Be5rkI53wqpCpl7xKbzd8JK_VffQRyfuMlbYWv4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"11/24 appt. I really wanted to like this office because the dentist I saw was very kind and the front desk staff is genuinely lovely, but the overall experience was incredibly frustrating.

I waited over an hour past my scheduled time because the dentist was still finishing another patient’s appointment. My own procedure then took much longer than expected, and when I finally left nearly two hours later, I received a call asking me to return because they had forgotten to take an impression of my bite. I went back, had the impressions done, and immediately afterward the temporary crown cracked, requiring me to return yet again.

I was told it would be five minutes, but in total I ended up spending three hours going in and out of this office for something that should have been handled correctly the first time. It is clear that patients dealing with urgent issues, especially those caused by the office’s own mistakes, are not prioritized.

The people are nice, but the disorganization and lack of attention to detail made this an exhausting and disappointing experience.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I saw Iryna for my cleaning and she did a great job at making sure I was comfortable. Overall, I enjoyed my visit! The staff took care of me every step of the way. Highly recommend SoHo Smile! 🦷✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClNUPP7UT8Pom2FMyTT7bE&fid=0x0:0xc5f5ce6b819dcf67"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"Priscilla Valeza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1XorSghxxt-3iF41UXSCbENdjOKDh7kjf7MH9F_4yzXoQow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have dental phobia from my past experiences at other dental practices I’ve been to, so I’ll admit I was quite nervous about coming in for a cleaning—especially since it had been over a year since my last one. However, the front desk staff, Monique and Dona, immediately helped put my mind at ease. They reassured me that the hygienist, Iryna, was not only highly skilled but also very gentle. After experiencing it firsthand, I can say with complete confidence that they were absolutely right. From the moment I entered the room, Iryna greeted me with warmth and reassurance. She even put on one of my favorite shows to watch during the appointment, which helped me relax right away. Throughout the cleaning, she was incredibly attentive and continually checked in to make sure I was comfortable. Dr. John was equally wonderful—truly one of the kindest and most personable doctors I’ve ever met. He took the time to walk me through the next steps of my dental plan in a way that felt supportive and reassuring. I left feeling so happy with the results and genuinely grateful that I chose SoHo Smile for my care. I’ll definitely be returning this summer, now with full confidence that I’m in excellent hands.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLa8LMYz0Eu5XhBQHoCW3FAOm5JaEZOpiw0UEdDa3Boj_1JEvVU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going to SohoSmile and honestly couldn’t be happier. The team is super friendly, everything runs on time, and the office always feels welcoming and professional.

Even though I’ve moved further away, I still make the trip because the staff is that great. Dr. John is honest, conservative with treatment, and someone you can truly trust. He explains everything clearly and never pushes unnecessary work.

The staff goes above and beyond with communication and making sure to accomodate me. Definitely 5 stars — so glad I have this place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadine A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3VL-G3S41uoAyzmsBgUZVoks4ARGe-naHNdn5T5EHc0dnWJWC8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Irina did a great job with my cleaning. She was very thorough but I didn’t feel uncomfortable. She also explained everything clearly, showing pictures so I understood what was going on with my teeth. Staff was also really friendly and made me feel at ease upon arrival. I do still have to go back for some follow up but overall my first appointment was good. :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Gagliardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUKhBiLH6xFLFBUUn-_2sKwVLq6gAL5XfA-R_cetgYXkH7UA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend this practice enough, especially Dr. Ari! I came in as an emergency after breaking three teeth, and Dr. Ari was absolutely incredible. Dr. John and Dr. Ari took the time to thoroughly explain my treatment options and walked me through every step of the process. His skill and attention to detail were amazing, and the results exceeded my expectations. My teeth look significantly better than they had before. Dr. Ari genuinely cares about his patients, as he regularly checks in on how my teeth are doing. When I needed other dental procedures, Dr. John and Dr. Ari also connected me with the best dental surgeons.
Dr. John and the entire team were also wonderful and professional throughout my visits. The office runs smoothly, and everyone made me feel welcome and comfortable. [{"Name":"Daria Dmitrochenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRbbqcHS5qbmPVxNNXEG8LvYkAUgzvXZrlC4E3LiDy3r84nHHy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had the best dental cleaning of my life. It was thorough, significantly improved the look of my teeth, and I barely felt anything.

My husband had an emergency tooth extraction, and Dr. Armstrong was wonderful with him. She also did my dental exam and never pushed any unnecessary procedures—she simply gave her professional opinion and reassured me when I was worried about my husband.

The front desk staff are polite, personable, and accommodating. They work with most major insurance providers and clearly explain in advance what may not be covered, so there are no surprises.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I cannot recommend this clinic enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christine Zavaleta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW4FFca4W_X6OIC3R3A5VzXXgOaBJ5GmqZereO0wnGTZwbj6I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came in for a last-minute appointment with Dr. Mohan for extreme tooth pain. It turned out I had a cracked tooth. Midtown Dental was able get me an appointment with a specialist immediately that same day. Once the specialist informed me that the tooth was not salvageable, I went back to Midtown Dental. They were able to accommodate me and perform the tooth extraction right there and then. Dr. Mohan referred me to DR. Armstrong, who performed the extraction. Fantastic service, would recommend them 100 times. So grateful to have been taken care of that day and to have immediate pain relief.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Vargas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWm8ACp_DL7v73GVKWET37PlAWPkxZN2aWJ1AscXbhRWUg-WPM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve never been a fan of going to dentist visits. I came across this location thru my insurance and decided to give it a try since it’s about a block away from my job. I truly found my dentist home. It’s been about a year since I started here and have had multiple visits with Violet, she makes my dentists visits so exciting. [{"Name":"Alex Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCqD-8zoa_b18lxXbPvjuLW5coSPAr3_YbqueWEQBgCwWhm8BT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"-i went here as a new patient for a basic dental cleaning
-my hygienists were ms. saba and ms. penelope and dr. park for my exam
-the questions i was asked were those that were very specific and targeted to MY NEEDS and that really matters. i was NOT given generic informatio bu instead at the end, given a treatment/maintainence plan that would allow me to keep the best oral health possible based on my needs at this time
-again, many areas of need were addressed with excellent inquiry on each matter such as gum health, bone erosion,genetic history, current diet, and replacement of old fillings. i have never experienced such a detailed inquiry bank at any healthcare facility, dental or medical.
-absolutely superb PROFESSIONAL quality of service. the staff here works as if we are all on a college floor and being graded on every patient - they really take service very seriously AND apply actual academics from their past training","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyaCgOzQWyQk7_oSU8ZPd4&fid=0x0:0x473ca88d15cb6018"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Agnes Isijola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKccoHqxKfYVleObcU0DUU_Ky-9zGkwprQsEr6QO7f-bUAoFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had tooth extraction on February 4 2026 by Dr Rita that performed excellent job, talked to me step by step professionally and friendly way. She extracted the tooth l did not even had much pain. Thanks Dr Rita. Ms . Leslie did xray for me and she was so nice and professional. My thanks to Ms Sophia and Amy. I recommend this Dental office to anyone who needs to be comfortable with Dental work, they will make you feel comfortable.. The office is extremely clean and neat. Thanks to everyone","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shiela Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMnnY9OyMw_ziTvSg9r05M300qqCx-lyveXYPw8CGUpS9E4h3UTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My 10-year-old daughter had an appointment with Dr. Yazdi. She came highly recommended by several people, and the reviews for Expert Dental were outstanding, so I brought my daughter here for a complicated cavity that might require a root canal.

From the very beginning, the front desk—especially Penelope—was incredibly helpful. They were patient with scheduling since I live far away, and they walked me through all my options while I’m in the middle of switching insurance. I’m so grateful for the time they took to help me. Every single person who answered my many phone calls was kind, courteous, and informative.

Dr. Yazdi was sweet and patient with my daughter. She explained everything in the treatment plan so clearly that I barely had any questions left to ask. I felt very reassured by her calm and thorough approach.

The billing department also took the time to explain every detail of the treatment costs with both my current insurance and my upcoming insurance for next year. The entire office runs smoothly, is very clean, and every staff member we interacted with was friendly.

From start to finish, the experience was excellent. I have full confidence in their ability to take care of my girl, and I’m grateful we found this practice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"G HK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0Mis_Par6IoCi8SQBN9UYIOt5BF-TAX0LeRcld9-KWBQcnw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Expert Dental exceeded my expectations in every way. From the moment I walked in, the staff welcomed me warmly and made the whole experience stress-free. The clinic is spotless, organized, and uses modern equipment, which gave me a lot of confidence. The dentist took the time to explain my treatment options, answered all my questions, and was extremely gentle during the procedure. I felt genuinely cared for, not rushed. My results look fantastic, and I’m very thankful for their professionalism and attention to detail. I highly recommend Expert Dental to anyone looking for high-quality, honest, and comfortable dental care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Connor Engel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHn_aYqyQSZyQovAv_K6OFurBmsb4Xm8PV4K_ZivzN5Y0Ckw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Expert Dental was friendly, informed, and professional.

I went in for a gum graft. Dr. Toscano was knowledgeable and kind. The procedure took less than 40 minutes and was mostly painless during and after.

Their insurance rep was incredibly helpful, probably the first time I actually understood my coverage and how the claims system worked. And from the different opinions I received from other practices the procedure ended up being below market cost since most of it was able to be reimbursed.

Each time I go I’m seem almost right after I check in and I never have to wait for long to check out. Though sometimes when they’re busy they can drag their feet on sending out prescriptions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPflbdP7t_h-tWd1Ij90Sism4Sm4CsWRzN1J-Q9nGZvTr6jQ8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everyone in the office is very nice and understanding. They were able to work with my less than ideal HMO plan and get me a crown that I needed.

Dr. Kwok did my crown work and was so patient. Dr. Charms saw me for a filling that had broken off and he was able to refer me to Dr. Kwok for prompt work despite his busy schedule that day. Dr. Gao helped me plan my treatment going forward and she was
clear and patient in explaining everything. Rubina the treatment coordinator is a life saver!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"holly jolly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpyH3rLyvkTtOGT_XIxigd3nRjdM9v_3-O1jNrxw0fVQuu9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Ma at Expert Dental was fantastic. I needed a crown and was able to get a same-day crown done, which was incredibly convenient. The entire process was smooth and efficient, and I didn’t have to come back for multiple appointments. Dr. Ma explained everything clearly and made sure I was comfortable the whole time. The crown fits perfectly and looks great. I really appreciated how easy and stress-free the experience was. Highly recommend Dr. Ma and Expert Dental!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Houzner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwLkoCdltXbKRWQ_qeeXCzl11CH-5v0XIpv081m_l2MbAhZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kudos to everyone at Expert Dental on a job well done! I had a front upper dental bridge installed last week after losing a tooth. I could not afford an implant but was advised by Dr Khezri a more affordable option for me was the bridge. I want to give a huge shoutout to all involved for helping me smile again with confidence at almost 68 years old! Special thanks to Dr Khezri and assistant Maria as well as everyone else at the front desk. One last special thank you to Zaida who helped me along these past few trying months with so much support and kindness to this old Jersey City guy! Thank you all from the bottom of my heart, your help and kindness will never be forgotten.
Sincerely and with respect…
James(Jim) Houzner","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sarah Aponte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuV5fSAHt5q0MWNs2GhF524nsYNgPgdl0XD3Pm5jXrZU1JfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience at Sky Dental! From the moment I walked in, everyone—from the front desk staff to the assistants, hygienist, and doctor—was incredibly warm, welcoming, and professional. I felt genuinely cared for throughout my entire visit. Highly recommend to anyone looking for top-notch dental care in a friendly and comfortable environment!
Added note: This is my third time going to Sky Dental. Delighted with their service. Thank you Colleen, Ruth, Christie, Jessi, Lecxy and Dr. T. for making my visit to the dentist more enjoyable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5GPVlmeVXpestL2gYGJ0Q&fid=0x0:0x32089f56608289a0"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Tom Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1odh6I2pLe8BraCepd5REnjgvayeULE0Y2dd-llGq5tzcGpLd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can you love your dentist? If you've ever gone to Sky Dental, you can absolutely say, "Yes!." Sky Dental is about the friendliest experience you can have with any service company anywhere. (not just dentists) My hygienist Colleen is amazing. Every doctor who's taken care of me has been super professional and kind. I post reviews for only the best of the best in NYC. This is one of them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reece Huff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvZVuCtDkbVVbJALcs1oNm306t2MjnEVbZk7oE1BC5fn3f=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came in for my first dental appointment since I moved to NYC on Feb 26th. everything went super smoothly, but I learned that one of my old fillings had popped out, and they recommended fixing that tooth along with filling three other teeth.

The soonest they could fit me in was the end of March, which was fine, but they said they would put me on the top of the list for cancellations…and wouldn’t you know, the very next day one opened up in the afternoon. I was able to snag it, and the office facilitated my very long (~2 hour) appointment right at the end of their busy day. Dr. Torkian’s work was amazing, and I’m already in much less pain.

Dr. Torkian and all of the dental assistants and front desk staff I interacted with made my experience at their office exceptional, and I look forward to having them as my dental team in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Theresa Marshman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJacU4dsac62mI2wOXziIl4BRkBx367Fjp74BdAnq1yeJvRd81m=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited Sky Dental for the first time and I felt right at home like this is my forever dentist.  Gabby, Danny, Shay at the front desk were welcoming and made me feel safe.  Danny deep-cleaned my teeth with precision and care.  Dr. Torkian explained in detailed what was needed to take care of teeth and handled me with kid gloves - I am petrified of the dentist, but Dr. T and her staff were absolutely Amazing.  I recommend Sky Dental to everyone reading this feedback.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jennnvel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5YcvrsAekuejqO_G89pNdTBUrDD_2aBP-6MaJSroB86Y-qH8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met Jesse he was really nice, helpful and patient. And Dr. T was who did my dental work. She’s always very nice and makes sure you’re always comfortable with the work she’s doing. I end up satisfied with her work every time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karina Usmanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJW3Z6oXd794JNKTfgUdpawVPNHYyXZyGGPkMZhdjJzDI_HTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience at this dental clinic. Dr. Scott saw my 2-year-old daughter for her very first dental visit, and he was kind, patient, and gentle throughout the appointment. The whole team made us feel comfortable, and my daughter was happy and relaxed. We are very pleased with the care we received and grateful for such a positive first dental experience. Highly recommend","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAd7iONd-MpxSGAet50pY75&fid=0x0:0x32089f56608289a0"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Olivia Keenan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_SSRdObTZ9b0AlfKV6l81YdnvhIl1OyOsoQq3CFCISoxgdAU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have always been cavity-prone and have therefore had pretty awful experiences with dentists. But Sky Dental is the first time I have felt wholly cared for and calm in the dentist's chair. The staff there, including the incredible Dr. Puzio, always make me feel welcome, and upon hearing about my past experiences, also make an effort to make me feel safe. I had to go there like 5 times in 2 months and I never dreaded it -- the version of me before Sky Dental would have never thought this was possible! I am so grateful that this is my dentist. I would recommend Sky Dental to anyone and everyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Temple Hammen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN9uF0z6RcyGxXDw0EwQZyDo80lqsLa8CdEpoWocWW1ocdyim6MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s incredible dentist experience! Dr. Rhieu was extremely thorough and answered all of my questions. Shay & Jessie were very helpful at the front desk - everyone is extremely friendly and welcoming! So happy to have this place as my dental home. 🦷","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Olga Ponomarenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHjiVEf9yeOiaEgimUcT43aKZQO0bKP-HW27ON1OKVN1ib90s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soho Dental is an amazing place with friendly, helpful and knowledgeable staff. Dr. Islam is the best. Have been her patient for the last 4 years. She is very knowledgeable, patient, and we always have the best conversation. She is always able to answer any and all of my questions. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatum Snelling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLMpdQP_RFceYzoe8RhlkzklEfP3pvfyZDgVJTvFiHVI04WNBN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had such a great experience at SoHo Dental. The entire office is clean, welcoming, and runs right on time, which I really appreciate.

Dr. Islam is fantastic—knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely cares about making you feel comfortable. She takes the time to explain everything clearly and never makes you feel rushed or pressured. I felt completely at ease and confident in the care I was receiving.

Highly recommend SoHo Dental and Dr. Islam if you’re looking for a dentist you can truly trust.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chris papandreou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUauLedIAD0MrygNDAFzXvjBghCGRU252vWEIXKLg6XqCH7yZAU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I was so impressed with the excellent care I received at Soho Dental NYC! Amar, the hygienist, was incredibly thorough yet gentle during my cleaning — one of the best I’ve ever had. Dr. Anna Takos is truly the best dentist I’ve come across in my 55+ years — professional, caring, and exceptionally skilled. The office itself is beautiful, modern, and cutting edge, and the receptionist went out of her way to be warm and welcoming. I’m so happy I made the switch. Absolutely and highly recommend Soho Dental!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikaela Morales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUn6mKKBxmPRCaVgov99jKrlzNA6rxCvKTR-sDKVnE2QnnuUE0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best dentist ever !
The team at this dental office provides excellent care from start to finish. The front desk is organized and welcoming, appointments run on time, and the assistants are professional and attentive. The doctors explain everything clearly and make every visit comfortable. The office is clean, efficient, and patient-focused. Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable and friendly dental care.                          Thanks Soho Dental 🙏🏻🙏🏻","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Kerr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFX5hKxumjPEWOmNBMufLG1rwNc9hoLXsE-A-bV02LX7yi2onc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been going to Soho Dental Group for the last three years. They are really helpful and efficient, and I always leave with my mouth feeling so fresh and clean. I’m glad to trust them with my dental health. Thanks for taking such great care of my teeth!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jefferson McLaughlin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-zJY4wLNlBr0GG_3KHk4sYJJ7WjzAgp-wqdIiLGOjjk2nBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The most frustrating dental experience I ever had.
Dr. Takos is a cash-hungry swindler.

Took off work to go get a crown that popped off a molar looked at. The dentist said even though the tooth and crown were undamaged, she wouldn’t take the easy (and cheap) option and just re-cement it, and said that paying $2000 for a new crown was the only option. After making some calls and doing some research, I told her assistant that I really just wanted it re-cemented because a new and expensive crown still didn’t seem necessary. Her assistant said this was alright as long as I signed something acknowledging that I would be to blame if anything were to go wrong after, which I said I would. The dentist then came back in and said that she still wouldn’t re-cement it, that it would be unethical to do so, and that she would be risking her name, reputation, and license if she did, even if I signed a paper stating otherwise. I was taken aback by how dramatic and uncooperative she was being, seeing as the worst that would happen is that the crown would just pop off again and it would be my fault as detailed in the would-be signed document. I gave up and left the office without any fix for my detached crown, all because the dentist wanted me to pay her $2000 for a new one instead of $50 for a simple re-cementing. Total money-grab, and now my risk for complications from the exposed tooth and gums increases with each passing day. Stay far away from this office and “dentist.”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joshua Gluck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXutFrPtdP0oa-gnF6F664BY6ntzNEKt0pO0ByXPKU4HbUvxa-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a great experience every time I come here! Fariya, Silvana and Samawia are always so kind, attentive and very thorough. They truly make going to the dentist a positive experience. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rika Goonetilleke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJz58W6i31aamIBjUREJFDzX1RRi3uWp_6r7Z_DNRBm-Ri6j4c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was amazing!!! Best doctor related office I have ever visited. Every single employee was so so pleasant and Dr. Islam was incredibly welcoming and knowledgeable. 10/10 would recommend. Will be my go-to dentist office from now on.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ashley Selett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnOMsr-z0jiMOK_GC2CVeTUiB0yeIKLfwc1IMBYg-ScTzA2FGp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First, I completely messed up my appointment day, and they were unbelievably gracious and accommodating. They still took me and made me feel totally welcome. From the moment you walk in, the front desk and every single person there is genuinely happy, warm, and incredibly helpful. It’s rare to feel that kind of positive energy in a medical office.

My hygienist, Myra, was so sweet and so thorough. She did my cleaning, X-rays, and scans with such care and professionalism. She made everything feel easy and comfortable.

And Dr. Bertman, I cannot say enough. I have seen so many dentists, periodontists, and oral surgeons over the years (I’m a complicated case), and he truly stands out. He is thoughtful, thorough, highly informed, and most importantly, trustworthy. He is not interested in pushing treatments or selling procedures. He listens carefully, evaluates comprehensively, and clearly only wants what’s actually best for his patients.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael-Daniel Oded","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLD7jDIkFEMf_KlQ3NoJpNUPpUsgNHRoNxvGUtJ8nr1Y-towA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Probably the kindest & most approachable dental staff I've ever encoutered. Skyler was incredibly patient and knowledgeable answering all my questions, Mayra did an amazing job with the cleaning and was so sweet the whole time, and Dr. Gaspari was very sharp yet I had the comfort of feeling like I was talking to a friend (Swear I've seen this guy at Whitehorse). Overall, the staff made this experience incredible, will be coming back here again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joe Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmO4tNNJjCSBGe4z2APhpieU0dyciMx7jZ7KJ5gp0tGgA_dCw3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here for my bi-annual cleaning and found Advanced Dental Arts NYC b/c of the great google reviews. My dental hygienist Mayra was fantastic and super friendly. Dr. Bertman was wonderful and addressed all of the questions/concerns I had. It was such a great experience I told my co-worker about this place who will most likely be coming here too! Would highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jefre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4LT0GqikR40-a28F_UrioZYP-TkFBCAcqW7zZPYVLcvW2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Terrific ambience & a very friendly empathetic staff. As an artist I appreciated the cool art around the office & art books in the waiting room. The doctor was efficient & patient & well informed. I look forward to the follow up appointment.The only not-so- wonderful part  is …..the expense. As a person with a limited income that part was a shock. I do hope I/ we can figure out a way to continue with their excellent treatment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Mackes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdxChbkqHLVDZ3reS9tL5cki5dsfGvv0PTn-lAfXwX0ICD0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Advanced Dental Arts for top-notch dentistry and exceptional patient care. I first visited several months ago and they are really helping with my oral care, including LANAP, improved gum health and a dental implant. They have a terrific team in place, led by Dr. Bertman. You can tell a lot by the energy of a place, and everyone here has made me feel comfortable and in good hands. In terms of perceived expertise and follow-up, I'd say they are definitely among the best out there. One gets the sense, not just from the name, but through the office's actions, that they are, in every sense, dental artists, taking the services they provide to a very high aesthetic level. And the rapidly improved state of my oral biome  concurs. Shout out to dental hygienist, Tatyana. She is awesome!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjJYuLs2Jlv4yE8T5MT49BRo1A9U4ivSyBndh04uq_CYkaHECQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Did cleaning few times here and had a good experience. Last year I had a procedure to install crown on my bottom 6. The crown I received did not fit, so I doctor decided to make some space by grinding some from my top tooth. After that both my bottom and top tooth are sensitive to hot/cold food, and actually I feel pain when I bite. I mentioned this a month later during my other visit to remove cavity (I don't know what they did there but that was the first time insurance did not approve something from my bill, but that's different story), but dentist didn't find any issue and said that it might be gone after some time. The problem is still there, so decided to switch to another dentist to try to actually fix problems

Also some time later they called me to book an appointment for me because my wife asked to book an appointment for me, but my wife doesn't even use this dentist","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karina Pichardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsc9qFLTRS1eFxeJkSq1LB6zOgtBoP6fnRS1x41ucL40eJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Todd Bertman is the best dentist I’ve ever had! A literal dream dentist. He makes you feel comfortable from the very beginning and explains things as he goes. Also excellent at his craft — truly elite. I normally dread going to the dentist, this was wonderful. Dr. Bertman made my whole week! Thank you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rita Gabis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQt4RDvg62U39Dq9S7fVDmC_FlkjcNQxPWu1SnPqMmfn1MJunh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the course of two days, Dr. Isabelle DeMatteis (oral surgeon)  and Dr. Kim (endodontist),  gave me a root canal and also extracted a molar. I have been seeing Dr. Todd Bertman and his wonderful staff for many years but this was my first experience with Dr. Kim and Dr. DeMatteis and both were outstanding.  I actually didn't feel Dr. Kim's numbing injections at all and he worked quickly, with great precision.  Dr.DeMatteis, who performed my molar extraction, was exceptionally kind and gave me just enough info during the procedure to let me know all was going as it should. The techs who worked with each dentist were stellar. I hate going to the dentist but I love Advanced Dental Arts. They are a ten star dental practice!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"kevin turner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuk0suJZMcG0l-MyI62au-GjKsvA9b4NBMQo-W5LiZHDxV-pko=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at this dental clinic. The staff is professional, friendly, and genuinely caring. The dentist explained the procedure clearly and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. The clinic is clean, modern, and well-organized, which made the visit stress-free. I’m very happy with the results and highly recommend this clinic for anyone seeking quality dental care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ace Deuce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4kGUFza_RE_l5TvYcgcJqjjyxxg0nSWmNM1YWyMi_9VyHUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Let me say how good God is. I called the facility very polite, was placed on hold. The young lady tells me she will transfer me to someone as I am a new client. She leaves me on hold for 20 minutes with no updates. I called back one time & she picked up with attitude accusing me of “keep calling”…that was untrue. She informs me she is working by herself (I can apply if you need someone new & professional). I apologize & tell her I’m sorry she is alone but I was not made aware. After that I simply ended the call because these are my TEETH. I can’t have unprofessional people playing in my mouth. Redirection is protection. Hire better help !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Sorrentino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpQcmgeKpeVKgODfB3SVhUJzMySYsLdmpgrRIDAatg7mzSPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This office is very unprofessional. I made an appointment in October for November. When I got to the office, they said the Dr. Lee was on vacation. So they made an appointment three weeks later.
On the day of my appointment for the second time. I got a phone call from Eloise, telling me they do not take my insurance 40 minutes before my appointment. I would find an office more professional beware and do not make an appointment with any of these doctors at New York City dental due to their unprofessionalism. On making appointments.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mia Francois","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAtYxoz7D3wubc8YBuNFfsWPwWmQJFRHNUY68LZzB2TCB8Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve had one of the worst doctor’s experiences with Dr. Lee. He had the front desk call me to see if I could move my appointment up so he could finish work early. I told them I would do my best. When I realized I needed to finish work and couldn’t come in earlier, I confirmed I would keep my original time.

I ran a bit late but still arrived well within the standard 15-minute grace period. It didn’t matter—he had already left before my scheduled appointment.

Mind you, I was coming from Brooklyn to Manhattan—an hour commute—to make sure I honored my appointment. The level of disregard for my time and effort is outrageous.

This was selfish, unprofessional, and completely disrespectful. I feel disgusted by the way I was treated, and I will never return as a patient of Dr. Lee. Do not waste your time going to see this dentist.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phillip Gallop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKG8m_NL6DzD6PwlgWT61IqGpZmpTLC3jjFvqJAqK7NM-QdQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff, doctors was very pleasant, patient and caring. They made me very comfortable. I would refer them to my family and friends","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kelly colon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuonAVDRGvPfm1e0ilJGtbnCYn-RAZqxbFncga4V0Es9ICeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Interactions with the receptionist, Mohammad, have been unprofessional, marked by a condescending and dismissive tone. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Christina Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUoVT__8w4tRZ0fzi2L_qzFL0xPbeAQMlPwpoNaQ7HHKvrc-wzJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We discovered Pearl Dental when our college freshman faced a dental emergency. The team provided immediate and exceptional care.

They quickly developed a clear plan of action, including a full breakdown of costs, and got to work right away.

The experience was top-tier, the depth of technical skills combined with outstanding client service, led our entire family to switch from our previous provider to Pearl Dental.

The entire team is fantastic. Appointments always start on time, there is never a wait. There's complete transparency around the cost of services, so no billing surprises.

The administrative team is always professional, friendly, and welcoming, every visit starts on a positive note.

The hygienists and dental assistants are gentle, putting the most anxious patient at ease. They take time to offer practical affordable advice for maintaining a healthy smile.

The dentists are attentive, thorough, and collaborate with one another to ensure the best client outcomes. They explain procedures clearly and check in frequently during treatment to ensure patient comfort.

Everyone on staff is genuinely committed to doing a great job. It's clear there's mutual respect and care among the team, which translates into a warm, welcoming experience for patients.

Angie, Anna, Beatriz, Tianna, Dr. Tatiana, Dr. Magda, Dr. Natalia, and the entire staff are truly the best in the industry.

We're proud to be a loyal Pearl Dental family and highly recommend them to everyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Serg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7yC4EqAGn9F0E8pH9Gh3n59UlABXB8WjMt605jvBJS_XL-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tatiana and Team go above and beyond to save and preserve your natural teeth! 110% recommend to anyone looking for professional dental care and someone you can truly trust. Additionally, they use best technology to make sure crowns fit perfect and stay for a long long time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adrianna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBFZ-4qguvYDlLoN5x0IQgP4P7qLoRea1yZFwC8KqlW_1I_CM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been looking for a dentist ever since moving to New York and I finally found one that ticks all of my boxes in Pearl Dental. Everyone is super kind and knowledgeable. The office is beautiful and clean. You can tell that the patient is always the priority in the way that they prioritize your comfort and take their time to get to know you. Dr. Perlroth is incredibly thorough and has great chairside manner. Both Anya and Angie were so welcoming and made me feel at home. The quality of the restorations are fantastic as well. I just got my first filling and they showed me pictures of the finished tooth while I was still in the chair and it looked exactly like a normal healthy tooth. If you are in the position I was in last year and looking to make a change in dental care, but feeling overwhelmed / not knowing where to start or who to trust, Pearl Dental is worth a visit!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leah Farhy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUGPBCk_VVc_74uc10S3qW6G3yQN3NbxVfy8wUEC7vNwL5S_k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a lovely experience at Pearl Dental! Dr. Perlroth was incredibly kind, patient, and gentle. The entire appointment was completely painless and so reassuring. You can really tell she cares about her patients and takes the time to make sure you’re comfortable every step of the way. The whole team was just as sweet, and her assistant, Anya, was so thoughtful and made me feel at ease right away. It’s rare to find a dental office that feels this warm and genuine. I’m so grateful to have found them and truly couldn’t recommend them more!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikhail Brandon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuXtMNKXVqepfvCV9GKo8OP8fnSIuQkN22O1YShvl33nOwSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough great things about Pearl Dental NYC. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with genuine warmth and professionalism. The entire staff is attentive, friendly, and truly committed to making every visit as comfortable as possible.

The office itself is spotless, modern, and calming—exactly the atmosphere you want when going to the dentist. My appointment was efficient, yet never rushed. The team took the time to explain everything clearly, answer all my questions, and ensure I felt completely at ease.

I walked out feeling confident, well taken care of, and beyond impressed. If you’re looking for a dental practice in NYC that combines expertise, compassion, and top-tier service, Pearl Dental NYC is truly the best. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Igor Vila Verde","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpfpcl9l-1Ixo2n4GESlDrv4dUX_EJma6_aUAnJ6nLEJDLlMxN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a wonderful experience at Pearl Dental. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and welcome. The front desk team was warm, professional, and efficient, making check-in and scheduling a breeze.

The dental team was outstanding—kind, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt at ease throughout my visit. The clinic itself is spotless, modern, and equipped with the latest technology, which gave me a lot of confidence in the care I was receiving.

What really stood out to me was the genuine care and attention from everyone I interacted with. They go above and beyond to ensure patients feel valued and cared for. I couldn’t be happier with my experience and highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for top-notch dental care!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kam Liang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDq4TG67gpcAgo7wusp5umsXDqdvHNw3OsEGdK-6hk721B1966ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just went in for another cleaning session and I must say I highly recommend this dental office. Before I even went into the office, I was sent reminders and even given a call.  When I showed up, I was greeted with warm smiles and was brought right in.  I felt like I got to see the entire team. This was the first time meeting their newest dental hygienist Angie. She was very personable and actually took the time to get to know me before we even talked about my teeth. It took away that weird feeling of having a silent stranger just digging right into my mouth. My teeth felt clean and refreshed after the session. I think the best part is I didn't feel judged the whole time. They gave me an awesome care package before I left. While setting up my next appointment, I totally forgot to complete the transaction for my copay and walked back into my office.  I was simply sent a link to complete it via text and I didn't need to go back. I've been coming for years and Dr. Perlroth was like an artist with my filling. Everyone that I've recommended has agreed Pearl Dental is amazing. I'm looking forward to my next visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rebecca King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvCO4h_02lO-yI7ia16kUMbTW0evQz6W5DMROGg0o2l7MyHg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pearl Dental has been a fantastic dentist. The staff is incredibly kind and communicative. I got my cavity drilled today and Dr. Magda explained exactly what was going to happen. She also showed me, before the filling, where the cavity was and how she could tell it was there. It was all very clear and made me confident I truly needed this procedure. The actual filling was quick and painless with almost no wait time. I would highly recommend this dentist!","Images":null,"When":""}]

You are in the best hands with her - she’s honest, incredibly knowledgeable, a true expert in her craft.  And everyone in her office could not be kinder. This place operates the way you want all doctors offices to run!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kizzy Massey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwyOFu-3Qc2gzznCJ1Fc7D0DfYu_iCIF2pPJu8GlB3GcbSxg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Since my initial visit at Diamond District Dental, I have been greeted with kindness and positivity. I consider myself to be a professional dental patient as I have had, and continue to have, a plethora of dental problems. I was hesitant to try a new dentist but I am so glad I did. Dr. Klempner is an incredible dentist and human. I have also received tremendous support around figuring out a plan to pay for the needed services. I highly recommend this practice for both routine dental visits and for those who need major work done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JAMES LOCKHART","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqHt1GzPFSU3reImRaebr-oihdk13WE476GHzl08v-MJYOLERTCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I set up an appointment with DDD for a bi annual cleaning through Zocdoc. Their office was very clean and the staff was friendly. My cleaning was thorough and felt like they did a good job until the shared my results with me. They said I had 6 cavities… 2 of which involved tooth decay and the other 4 were recommended to get taken care of quickly. For context I take good enough care of my teeth and have never had a cavity in my life.

After sharing the results, I was rushed to set up my next appointment to have my “cavities” taken care of. All of which would have cost thousands of dollars out of pocket. They said my insurance covered none of it and they would be happy to put me on a payment plan. I felt overwhelmed and pressured so I walked out without scheduling anything.

Thankfully I have a trusted family dentist back home who I got a second opinion from. He confirmed I have no cavities, no tooth decay and that the X-rays DDD took were not high quality.

Shame on this practice for trying to take advantage of a new patient and have them receive unnecessary dental work. I will not be returning and would not recommend people use them as a new patient.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ginicoe Inventor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfOElqyw0a_l2kamn2LJCVMLaKIDMvUJgmaPvA4o2mY-zJPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I arrived for a consultation and Dr. Klempner and hist staff listen to me and then went right to work on the spot. I love the production at this office.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janet Puente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkuNK2f2Ocg6fQgXBDvcQYYYqzATUgmgjcinnao7_wOBttUjo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doctor Klempner and staff are amazing. Everyone was kind and explained everything with detail. I'm so happy with his work. My smile looks  very natural it gave a boost of  confidence.
